text: I feel intrigued by the openness and quiet of the space in the first image, as if awaiting an event or silent revelation. The asymmetry of my view adds a dreamlike quality to the moment; it encourages idle contemplation. In the second image, I am energized and curious—a vivid exhibition radiates creativity and the promise of new knowledge. The environment feels playful and thoughtful, inviting me to reflect on how humans connect with technology and each other.
